notes:
Reference answer for T02 (Global Health Data Finder). Key indicator codes by source:

WHO:
- WHOSIS_000001: Life expectancy at birth
- WHOSIS_000002: Healthy life expectancy (HALE) at birth
- WHOSIS_000015: Life expectancy at age 60
- WHOSIS_000007: Healthy life expectancy (HALE) at age 60
- WSH_INF_MORT: Infant mortality rate
- MDG_0000000001: Under-5 mortality rate
- MDG_0000000026: Maternal mortality ratio

World Bank:
- SP.DYN.LE00.IN: Life expectancy at birth (total)
- SP.DYN.IMRT.IN: Infant mortality rate
- SH.DYN.MORT: Under-5 mortality rate

Eurostat:
- demo_mlexpec: Life expectancy by age and sex
- hlth_ehis_de2: Healthy life years
- hlth_cd_aro: Causes of death — absolute numbers
- hlth_cd_asdr: Causes of death — standardised death rate

Coverage: WHO and World Bank are global (~1960/2000–2023, annual, national); Eurostat covers EU/EFTA/candidates (~1990–2023, annual, national + NUTS2).
